title: Place and ethnic group summaries - Stats NZ
content:
## Place and ethnic group summaries
- Māori ethnic group population 887,493 2023 Census usually resident population
- Auckland region population 1,816,000 Estimated resident population at 30 June 2025
- Wellington region population 543,400 Estimated resident population at 30 June 2025
- Canterbury region population 698,200 Estimated resident population at 30 June 2025
- Middle Eastern/Latin American/African

## Help and information
Information, updates, user guides and more can be found on our Place and ethnic group summaries help and information page. Check out our video tutorials, get help or give feedback and learn about the geographic levels and ethnic groups used in this tool.
